description: Stores enriched results for each completed VIN check

columns.name: RunId
columns.description: Links back to VIN_Check_Requests and VIN_Audit_Log

columns.name: GoogleResult
columns.description: Raw text extracted from Google VIN search result page

columns.name: GoogleScreenshotPath
columns.description: SharePoint relative path to the evidence screenshot

columns.name: MOIAccidentCount
columns.description: Number of accidents reported by MOI UAE inquiry

columns.name: MOIResult
columns.description: Raw text from MOI UAE Accidents Inquiry response

columns.name: MOIScreenshotPath
columns.description: SharePoint relative path to the MOI evidence screenshot

columns.name: AutorolaVINMatched
columns.description: True only if the Autorola Fleet Monitor row VIN exactly matches input VIN

columns.name: AutorolaCommentWritten
columns.description: True if the internal comment was successfully appended to Autorola

columns.name: AutorolaScreenshotPath
columns.description: SharePoint relative path to the Autorola evidence screenshot

columns.name: Disposition
columns.description: Clear = no flags; TradeOnly = accident/salvage detected; ManualReview = human gate triggered

columns.name: CompletedDate
columns.description: UTC timestamp when all sources were checked and result was written
